texto: Certainly, Gandhi is not inferior to Christ in goodness and sanctity, and he surpasses him in touching humility. Gandhi is the prophet of hope in this age of pessimism and disillusionment. He is a promise of sanity in the madness induced by our world's heedless drinking at the fount of war.
explicacao: Citação de Sudhir Kakar sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Certainly, Gandhi is not inferior to Christ in goodness and sanctity, and he surpasses him in tou…” articula reflexao, inspirational-life, gandhi em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
